title: More Beautiful Doors
description: This mod adds around 240 new Doors and extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Doors. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new doors you must first create the Door Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any door from the vanilla game for the recipe. You can now use the Door Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Doors emit light like their respective blocks.

All Doors

Example of Door Frame recipe

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 2 doors)

Magma Block Door

Obsidian Cry Door

Diamond Block Door

Red Stained Glass Door (All types of glass are present)

Special Doors

For some doors you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Door, Fire Soul Door, Lava Door(2 version), Nether Portal and Strange Door(no texture).

Perfect for secret passages
